name: Indian Wells Lodge Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the crumbled blue cheese and salt.
2. Gradually add the Wesson oil while stirring continuously until well combined.
3. Stir in the paprika, vinegar, and oregano until incorporated.
4. Transfer the dressing to an airtight container and store at room temperature.
5. This recipe makes one quart of salad dressing.
